gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor bends forward slightly, looks at the apples, and gestures wide with both arms to invite curiosity.
a person claps their hands together, smiles, and steps forward enthusiastically while encouraging the class to participate.
a tutor stands tall and gestures overhead with one arm while introducing the number line from zero to ten.
a person moves their right hand outward as if tracing the number line and walks right while counting five more steps.
a tutor turns to face the students, points animatedly at the invisible number line, and invites them to answer excitedly.
a person leans in slightly, gestures with both hands to the side, and encourages everyone to count up from five together.
a tutor jumps lightly on the balls of their feet, raises both arms high, and beams with excitement after celebrating the students' success.
a person steps back with a smile, motions with both hands invitingly, and encourages the students to keep practicing addition.
